rationale: Three exact official MTA rows establish realized QBNR rename dates and one new QM successor route identity per row. Each rename is a bounded Queens Bus Network Redesign route-redesign bundle. X63, X64, and X68 remain distinct predecessor identities mentioned only in treatment evidence; later downstream crosswalk review may connect pre- and post-redesign series without merging canonical routes.

clauses.label: QM63 route rename
clauses.source_quote: The X63 will be renamed the QM63.

clauses.label: QM63 queens reroute
clauses.source_quote: In Queens, the QM63 will be rerouted to use 249 St instead of Sunrise Hwy in both directions.

clauses.label: QM63 midtown stop additions
clauses.source_quote: Midtown-bound QM63 trips will make stops on 23 St, Madison Av, and 57 St.
clauses.description: Source-stated QM63 midtown stop additions treatment.

clauses.label: QM63 avenue service discontinuation
clauses.source_quote: Service on 3 and 5 Avs will be discontinued.
clauses.description: Source-stated QM63 avenue service discontinuation treatment.

clauses.source_quote: The Queens-bound QM63 routing in Manhattan will not change.
clauses.review_rationale: Source context, continuity, navigation, or another route reference; no treatment or route edge.

clauses.label: QM63 stop removal
clauses.source_quote: Some stops have been removed from this route.
View the full list of stops.
clauses.review_rationale: Source context or continuity; no treatment or route edge.

clauses.label: QM63 frequency span adjustment
clauses.source_quote: Peak frequency will decrease slightly, and service spans will change.
clauses.description: Source-stated QM63 frequency span adjustment treatment.
